violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelves in the kitchen are lined with cardboard. Cardboard is an absorbent surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles need repair from sprinkler system going off.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
